# {id} {slug} — Progress

> Maintained by the orchestrator. Do not edit manually except for the human gate (`/cc-nexs-minimal:approve-spec`).

## Current State

```yaml
current_state: INIT
updated_at: null
feature_id: "{id}"
feature_slug: "{slug}"
preset: preset-minimal
```

## Counters

```yaml
review_revision: 0
fix_per_bug: {}
evaluator_reject: 0
```

## Sprint Progress

```yaml
enabled: false
total: 0
current: 0
status: {}
```

## Human Gate

```yaml
approved_at: null
approver: null
```

## History

(Each state transition appends a line: `- <ts> <from> → <to>  <reason>`)

## Human Required

(Items that humans must do because the agent physically cannot: deployment, prod operations, real-device tests, business judgement on copy/amount/permission.)
